case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, A CORPORATION VS. CHERYL A GLOECKNER

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GLOECKNER, CHERYL A JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOECKNER, CHERYL A $8,731.97 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,956.97, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GLOECKNER, CHERYL A
